name: Scrambled Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 lb medium firm tofu made with calcium, drained (see notes)
2 tablespoons tamari soy sauce, or veg. bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tofu well.
2. In a skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
3. Sauté the garlic (and green onions and mushrooms if using) until the vegetables are soft.
4. Add the drained tofu to the skillet and stir in the tamari soy sauce (or veggie bouillon).
5. If using nutritional yeast, sprinkle it in now.
6. Use a fork to scramble the tofu in the skillet.
7. Cook on medium heat for 2 - 3 minutes until the tofu is cooked through.
8. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
